message:
fix(render-term): fix off-by-one in diagram block boundary detection

Fix find_last_diagram_char() to return the byte position after the last
diagram character (i + ch.len_utf8()) instead of just the character
index, ensuring correct byte-boundary calculations for multi-byte
characters in diagram text.

Fix detect_diagram_blocks() to use the corrected return value directly
(max_col = last_diagram_col) instead of adding 1, which previously
double-counted the boundary offset and could clip the rightmost column
of detected diagram blocks.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
